name: context-engineering-fundamentals
description: Foundational context engineering skills covering context anatomy, degradation patterns, and compression techniques.

interface.shortDescription: Core context concepts and failure modes.
interface.longDescription: A focused bundle of the foundational context engineering skills: context fundamentals, context degradation, and context compression.
defaultPrompt: Explain the core mechanics of context windows in agent systems.
Diagnose lost-in-the-middle and other context failure modes.
Recommend ways to compress long agent context safely.
